table also identiﬁes which survey types contain a speciﬁc question along with the question number for that survey. Any

IV. Crosswalk: 2007 to 2025

The crosswalk tables summarize the presence of analytic variables across all years of survey administration. There is a
separate crosswalk table for each survey type. The crosswalk tables document the question number for each survey item in
each year
